headline: Parmelin denounces EU steel safeguards as "counterproductive."
summary: Speaking on SRF radio Saturday, Economics Minister and President Guy Parmelin warned that the EU's planned steel import safeguard measures (effective 1 July) risk a "friendly-fire" outcome — Switzerland, outside the EEA, is not exempted despite deep supply-chain integration.

headline: SMILE solar-weather satellite launches Tuesday carrying Swiss-built X-ray cooler.
summary: The ESA–CAS joint mission lifts off on a Vega-C from Kourou on **19 May at 05:52 CEST**.

headline: "No 10 million Swiss" referendum: record CHF 15.52 M declared for campaigns.
summary: Supporters (SVP-backed Yes camp, CHF 6.44 M) and opponents (No camp led by Economiesuisse, CHF 4 M+ of CHF 9 M total) together declared the highest campaign budget since mandatory disclosure was introduced.

headline: Switzerland backs new Special Tribunal for the Crime of Aggression against Ukraine.
summary: At the Council of Europe ministerial meeting in Chișinău on 15 May, Switzerland announced accession to the expanded partial agreement establishing the tribunal — filling the ICC's jurisdictional gap on aggression.

headline: Ukraine's largest drone barrage in months: ~500 drones, 4 dead, Moscow oil refinery struck.
summary: Launched overnight 16–17 May, with Russia claiming 556 drones destroyed across the country.

headline: WHO declares Ebola (Bundibugyo strain) in DRC and Uganda a PHEIC.
summary: On 17 May the WHO Director-General upgraded the cross-border outbreak: 8 lab-confirmed + 246 suspected cases in DRC's Ituri Province (health workers among the dead), and 2 confirmed cases in Kampala with no apparent epidemiological link.

headline: Hamas military commander Izz al-Din al-Haddad killed in Gaza strike.
summary: Israel confirmed the death of the Qassam Brigades chief — one of the last surviving architects of October 7 — in a Gaza City strike on 15 May.

headline: Trump–Xi summit wrap: Xi secures "strategic stability" frame without yielding ground.
summary: Post-summit analysis finds Xi extracted a "constructive China–US strategic stability" framework as Beijing's guiding template for 3+ years; Nvidia H200 chip exports to China approved; China pledges 200 Boeing jets (half the 500 initially floated).

headline: Israel–Lebanon ceasefire fragmenting; Hezbollah declares talks a "dead end."
summary: Multiple Israeli strikes near Tyre and other southern Lebanese sites continued despite a 45-day ceasefire extension agreed ~15 May.

headline: First direct image of a cosmic web filament (3 million light-years).
summary: Astronomers produced the sharpest-ever image of a single cosmic filament connecting two actively star-forming galaxies seen when the universe was ~2 billion years old — the first direct detailed observation of the large-scale structural scaffolding at this resolution.

headline: Anesthetized human brains keep processing language.
summary: Hippocampal neuron recordings from unconscious surgical patients show cells predicting upcoming words in heard phrases and responding to auditory "oddballs" — challenging assumptions about the depth of cognitive suppression under general anesthesia.

headline: Oxford team demonstrates relativistic plasma harmonics route to extreme laser intensities.
summary: By precisely shaping the leading edge of ultrafast high-power pulses, bright harmonic radiation was generated from plasma oscillating near the speed of light — clearing a long-standing barrier toward compact particle accelerators and attosecond-science sources.

headline: New technique reads dark-matter imprint from gravitational-wave data.
summary: MIT-led team modelled how black-hole merger GW signals differ in dense dark-matter environments; retrospective analysis of 28 confirmed GW events flagged GW190728 as a candidate with a possible dark-matter imprint.

headline: [arXiv:2505.19862](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.19862) — REA-RL: Reflection-Aware Online RL for Efficient Reasoning.
summary: Introduces a lightweight reflection model that enables both parallel sampling and sequential revision during online RL training, improving token efficiency in reasoning tasks without accuracy loss.

headline: [arXiv:2602.13953](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.13953) — QuRL: Efficient RL with Quantized Rollout
[arXiv:2602.05183](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.05183) — Data-Centric Interpretability for LLM-based Multi-Agent RL
EUR/CHF 0.9144; USD/CHF ~0.787.
summary: ECB reference rate for EUR/CHF as of Friday 15 May 2026; implied EUR/USD ≈ 1.162.

headline: Asian equities cautious Monday: Nikkei −0.92% early session.
summary: Trump issued a fresh Iran warning over the weekend ("get moving, FAST"), reviving Strait of Hormuz escalation fears and weighing on risk appetite at the Asian open.
